seo.title: Carto TV - Watch Live TV | Streaming Global Channels Worldwide
seo.description: Watch Thousands of free TV channels from all countries in the world. Discover on an interactive 3D satellite globe your favorite News, Movies, Sports, Kids Shows, Entertainment.

channels.linkCopiedDesc: Share link has been copied to clipboard.

seo.title: Who We Are - Carto TV
seo.description: Learn about Carto TV's mission to bring free global television to everyone.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: Bringing the world's television to your fingertips

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Carto TV is dedicated to providing free access to live television channels from around the world. Our interactive 3D globe interface makes discovering international content an engaging and immersive experience. We believe that access to global media should be free and accessible to everyone.

items.globe: Interactive 3D satellite globe navigation in HD on any device.
items.content: Live streaming of News, Sports, Entertainment, Movies in genres like Action, Horror, Sci-Fi, Crime, Comedy and alot More
items.free: No Registration, No Subscription Required, Ever - Completely Free.

team.title: Built by Geo-Appsmith
team.builtBy: CartoTV is proudly built by Geo-Appsmith, a location-services consulting company powered by a dedicated team of GIS Developers and Engineers passionate about creating tools, applications, and geospatial systems that truly delight.
team.driven: We are driven by curiosity and innovation — constantly pushing boundaries and solving problems in creative, unconventional ways. We love understanding how things work, asking the tough questions, and designing smart solutions that make a real impact.
team.commitment: At our core, we are especially committed to developing geospatial solutions that serve underserved communities around the world. We believe maps and location intelligence are powerful tools for inclusion, access, and opportunity.
team.collaborate: Whether you have a mapping task, a GIS project, or any idea involving maps — big or small — we'd love to collaborate.
team.contact: Feel free to reach out to us at hello@cartotv.com and let's explore how we can work together to bring your vision to life.

seo.title: Terms of Service - Carto TV
seo.description: Read Carto TV's terms of service and usage policies.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing and using Carto TV ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.text: Carto TV provides a free platform to access publicly available live television streams from around the world through an interactive 3D globe interface.

content.title: 3. Content Disclaimer
content.text: All television streams accessible through Carto TV are publicly available on the internet. We do not control, endorse, or take responsibility for the content of these streams.

items.unlawful: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
items.interfere: Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the Service
items.reproduce: Reproduce, duplicate, or resell any part of the Service
items.automated: Access the Service through automated means or bots

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.text: The Carto TV interface, design, and logo are proprietary to Carto TV. Television content is owned by the respective broadcasters.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: Carto TV is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.text: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at

seo.title: Privacy Policy - Carto TV
seo.description: Learn how Carto TV protects your privacy and handles data.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.intro: Carto TV is designed with privacy in mind. We collect minimal information:

usage.label: Usage Data
usage.text: Anonymous analytics about how our Service is used

localStorage.label: Local Storage
localStorage.text: Your favorites are stored locally in your browser

technical.label: Technical Data
technical.text: Standard server logs for security purposes

noAccount.title: 2. No Account Required
noAccount.text: Carto TV does not require user registration. We do not collect personal information.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.disable: You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

streams.label: Stream Providers
streams.text: External TV streams may have their own tracking

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.text: We implement reasonable security measures to protect any data we collect.

children.title: 6. Children's Privacy
children.text: Our Service is not directed to children under 13.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.text: Since we collect minimal data, there is generally no personal data to access or delete.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.text: For questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

home.streamingText: Carto TV offers free access to over 10,000 live television channels from 179 countries worldwide. Browse channels using our interactive 3D satellite globe interface. Watch News, Sports, Entertainment, Movies, Music, Kids content, and Documentaries — no registration or subscription required.

about.missionText: Carto TV is dedicated to providing free access to live television from around the world. Our innovative 3D globe interface lets you explore and watch TV channels from 179 countries without registration.

terms.text: These terms govern your use of the Carto TV free live television streaming platform. By using our service, you agree to these terms.

privacy.text: Carto TV is committed to protecting your privacy. We collect minimal data and require no registration. Learn about our cookie policy, data protection practices, and your rights.

countryPage.selectCountry: Select a country to browse channels
countryPage.watchDescription: Stream live television from {{country}} for free on Carto TV. Browse through news, sports, entertainment, and more channels — no registration or subscription required. Simply pick a channel and start watching instantly.
countryPage.howToWatchText: Select any channel from the list above and click play. All streams are free and accessible worldwide. Use the search bar to find specific channels or filter by category.
